raw_consumer_statement: I disputed 2 charges for transactions in XXXX on XX/XX/year>. One for {$320.00} and one for {$260.00} that I did not make. I used a cab service at the airport and ended up with both of these charges that have been made at so called lounges. American express has denied the disputes twice now. They can not provide a receipt with a signature and highly doubt they even looked into the matter. I have one disputed a charge one other time in my 10+ years with this company ( which was also denied ). This is criminal and can not continue to be let go of. You are not protected as an American Express customer
